name: Denbury Inc.
description: Denbury Inc. is an independent energy company with operations focused on carbon capture, utilization, and storage (CCUS) and enhanced oil recovery (EOR) in the Gulf Coast and Rocky Mountain regions. The company is a leader in utilizing carbon dioxide (CO2) for enhanced oil recovery, which allows it to produce low-carbon intensity oil while safely and permanently storing CO2 underground. Denbury was acquired by ExxonMobil in November 2023, expanding ExxonMobil's carbon capture and storage capabilities.
